# 80s Grid

> A daily interactive trivia game challenging fans of 1980s music, pop culture, and movies.

## About
80s Grid (80sgrid.com) is a daily puzzle where users match artists, movies, and cultural icons across a 3x3 grid. It focuses on the New Wave, Synth-pop, and Post-punk eras, featuring bands like Depeche Mode, The Cure, and Duran Duran.

## Key Features
- **Daily Grid:** A new trivia challenge every 24 hours.
- **Niche Categories:** Specifically curated for Gen X and 80s aficionados.
- **Mobile Optimized:** Designed for quick, daily play on any device.

## Target Entities
- 1980s Music (New Wave, Synth-pop, Hair Metal)
- 1980s Cinema (Brat Pack, Cult Classics)
- Trivia & Interactive Puzzles
- 80sgrid.com Game Mechanics
